characters.name: Ishmael
characters.description: The narrator, a philosophical young man drawn to the sea whenever he feels restless or melancholy.

characters.name: Queequeg
characters.description: A Pacific Islander and skilled harpooner, initially frightening but becomes Ishmael's close companion and bedmate at the inn.

voice_profile.tone: philosophical and literary with digressions and dry humour

settings.name: Manhattan
settings.description: The island city where Ishmael begins his journey, drawn to the waterfront.

settings.name: New Bedford
settings.description: Whaling port town where Ishmael arrives on his way to Nantucket.

settings.name: The Spouter-Inn
settings.description: Peter Coffin's inn in New Bedford where Ishmael stays and shares a bed with Queequeg.

plot_threads.thread: Ishmael's journey to find a whaling ship and go to sea
The unlikely friendship between Ishmael and Queequeg, the cannibal harpooner

world_rules: The whaling industry is a major economic force, drawing men from all walks of life
New Bedford and Nantucket are the centres of the American whaling trade
